title: Selling Design Assets with Crypto Payments: What It Actually Is and How It Works: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria trying to sell ebooks, courses, or design assets without getting blocked by PayPal, you're not alone. Many of us face similar restrictions from platforms like Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip due to geographic or banking limitations. It's frustrating to watch your sales dwindle or get stuck in verification limbo. That's why I'm here to break down the solution to selling digital products with crypto payments, without the hassle of traditional gatekeepers.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling design assets with crypto payments is a straightforward way to bypass geographical restrictions and banking limitations that hinder your sales. By leveraging cryptocurrency as a payment method, you can reach a wider audience and earn more without relying on traditional payment processors. This approach also allows you to maintain full creative control over your digital products and pricing, ensuring you receive the full value of your work.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

To facilitate crypto payments, we use blockchain-based technologies, such as Web3 Wallet Connect, which integrates multi-chain QR code generation and live price feeds. This enables buyers to pay in cryptocurrencies like BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and over 300 other coins, while also providing instant automated delivery of your digital products. Our payment processor, NOWPayments, handles the transactions with no KYC or buyer account requirements, ensuring a seamless experience for both creators and buyers.
Who This Is Built For and Why

If you're a digital creator facing restrictions on platforms like PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip, this solution is tailored for you. It's also ideal for solo developers building crypto-native digital product stores who want to offer their customers a seamless payment experience. By using our tools, you can tap into the vast potential of the cryptocurrency market and reach a global audience without the hassle of traditional payment processing.
Cryptocurrency payment processing eliminates the need for traditional payment processors, allowing you to reach a wider audience and earn more.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Our suite of tools includes the Core Shop Engine, which handles automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, all without requiring a payment processor account. The Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics, transaction logs, and order management, giving you complete control over your digital product sales. With the Full Stack Bundle, you'll also get priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide to ensure a smooth setup process.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand how to sell design assets with crypto payments, it's time to take action. Start by integrating Web3 Wallet Connect into your store and configuring the payment processor settings. Next, optimize your digital product listings and pricing to attract more buyers. Finally, promote your store to reach a wider audience and drive sales. With our tools and guidance, you'll be up and running in no time, ready to start selling design assets globally with crypto payments.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Web3 Wallet Connect integrates multi-chain QR code generation and live price feeds, enabling buyers to pay in over 300 cryptocurrencies.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for more ways to sell digital downloads without fees, consider using our Shop URL (https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html) to create a custom store. You can also explore our Web3 Wallet Connect product ($19.99) for seamless frontend wallet integration and multi-chain QR generation.
Your Action Checklist

Prepare your product files in delivery-ready format — PDF for ebooks, ZIP archives for multi-file products like font families or preset packs. Set your prices in USD and use NOWPayments to handle the crypto equivalent calculation automatically. Deploy the Core Shop Engine and configure your product list with file paths, prices, and delivery settings. Set up Web3 Wallet Connect with your product display and checkout configuration. Test the checkout flow in a browser on both desktop and mobile — confirm the QR code generates correctly and the payment amount displays accurately. Complete a real mainnet test transaction and confirm the delivery email arrives with a working download link. Open the Admin Dashboard and verify the test transaction appears with correct details. Once the test passes, publish your store URL across your content channels. Review your first week of transactions in the Admin Dashboard to confirm everything is running correctly.
By using our tools, you can maintain full creative control over your digital products and pricing, ensuring you receive the full value of your work.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
